value.found_quote:
Runtime data produced by sidecars are stored in `~/.gemini/antigravity/sidecar_data/
/`.
value.rationale: The page, hosted on google's antigravity.google domain, includes a "Runtime Data" section describing how runtime data produced by sidecars is stored, including data/, logs/, and events/ subdirectories. This substantiates that Runtime Data is a described feature.
